admin_review_actions.label: Return for correction
admin_review_actions.purpose: Admin returns the article to Editor with structured correction notes.

admin_review_actions.label: Archive
admin_review_actions.purpose: Admin archives unsuitable, duplicate, weak, unsafe or deferred article candidates.

admin_review_actions.label: Hold for Admin review
admin_review_actions.purpose: Admin keeps the article in internal review pending evidence, delta review or policy decision.

admin_review_actions.label: Internal clearance candidate
admin_review_actions.purpose: Admin marks that the item may later enter controlled static apply readiness; this is not publishing.

admin_review_actions.label: Publish
admin_review_actions.purpose: Plan the Admin publish action, but keep actual publishing blocked until later controlled static/dynamic approval path.

admin_review_actions.label: Publish and close
admin_review_actions.purpose: Plan Admin publish-and-close action, but keep execution blocked until later controlled static/dynamic approval path.
